headline: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call for August 4, 2026
summary: MIDLAND, Texas, June 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (“Diamondback”), today announced that it plans to release second quarter 2026 financial results on August 3, 2026 after the market closes. In connection with the earnings release, Diamondback will host a conference call and webcast for investors and analysts to discuss its results for the second quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, August 4, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. CT.
